results.title: 'Jim Halsey: Starmaker' exhibit opens before event celebrating his lifetime achievement award
results.description: A June 2 concert event will take place at Oral Roberts University in conjunction with Halsey earning the CMA Touring Lifetime Achievement Award. Memorabilia from Halsey's career is on display at Museum of Tulsa History.
